title: Sekisui Chemical and Velocys Form a Strategic Partnership to Advance COâ‚‚-Derived e-SAF Production Technology
content: SEKISUI CHEMICAL CO., LTD. and Velocys Inc. have signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) establishing a strategic partnership to advance production technology for electro-Sustainable Aviation Fuel (e-SAF), a CO2-derived synthetic fuel. This partnership combines SEKISUI CHEMICALâ€™s CO2â†’CO chemical looping technology with Velocysâ€™ Fischer-Tropsch (FT) microchannel reactor technology to enable the manufacture of synthetic fuels using CO2 as a feedstock, thus contributing to decarbonization.
author: Analysts Account
